title: Uncaught 404 Console Errors on Landing Page
expected_behavior: The landing page and blog render without uncaught console errors or 404 failed resources.
actual_behavior: Several resources failed to load with a 404 status, triggering console errors on page load.
suspected_cause: Missing static assets or broken link pre-fetching in Next.js/production deployment.
suggested_fix: Verify static assets availability and correct paths for pre-fetched routes or assets.
reproduction_steps: Observe 404 errors for failed resource loads

evidence.summary: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 ()
Full-page screenshot of the landing page showing actual visual output

suggested_regression_test.title: Check console for 404 errors during remote navigation
steps: Scan console errors array for any HTTP 404 occurrences
suggested_regression_test.assertion: Console error list should be empty
